
### checking use-after-free (3) 

<!-- \lstset{
        language=C,style=script,
        moredelim={**[is][\btHL<2>]{~2~}{~end~}},
    } -->
  

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column}

```{.c style="font-size: 90%"}
void someFunction() {
    int *quux = malloc(sizeof(int));
    ...
    // A
    do {
        // B
        ...
        if (anotherFunction()) {
            free(quux);
            // C
        }
        ...
        // D
    } while (complexFunction());
    ...
    // E
    *quux++;
    ...
}
```

::::

:::: {.column}

::: {.r-stack}

![](/static/texfig/useAfterFree3.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1 width=500px}

![](/static/texfig/useAfterFree3.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2 width=500px}

![](/static/texfig/useAfterFree3.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3 width=500px}

![](/static/texfig/useAfterFree3.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4 width=500px}

![](/static/texfig/useAfterFree3.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5 width=500px}

![](/static/texfig/useAfterFree3.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6 width=500px}

:::

::::

:::::


### result from clang's scan-build  {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column}

![](/static/scan-build-uaf-example3a){height=450px}

::::

:::: {.column}
 
![](/static/scan-build-uaf-example3b){height=450px}

::::

:::::
